description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named centos_gcc that runs in the default test stage on a runner tagged gcc,centos. The job executes the following shell commands in order: mkdir solver/build, cd solver/build, cmake -DSERIAL=ON -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=gcc -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=g++ .., make tests, and ctest --output-on-failure. No Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined, so the job runs on any branch or tag. This configuration builds and tests the solver using GCC on a CentOS environment.
